sectionIntro.title: A decade of measurable change
sectionIntro.description: Numbers that represent families, not just figures — every statistic below reflects a household that took a step forward.

successStoriesIntro.title: Voices from the field
successStoriesIntro.description: Real journeys from borrowers who turned small loans into lasting change.

testimonials.name: Meena Devi
testimonials.quote: My tailoring stall was just a table under a tree. With my first loan I bought a sewing machine, and with the second I rented a small shop. Today two other women work with me.
testimonials.result: Business grew from 1 to 3 employees in 2 years

testimonials.name: Ramesh Yadav
testimonials.quote: The loan process felt different from what I expected — no middlemen, no extra charges. The field officer visited my farm before approving anything, which gave me confidence.
testimonials.result: Doubled dairy herd from 2 to 5 cattle

testimonials.name: Sunita Kumari
testimonials.quote: The financial literacy sessions taught me how to track my daily sales properly. For the first time, I know exactly how much profit my shop makes every month.
testimonials.result: Now manages a registered grocery store

testimonials.name: Geeta Sharma
testimonials.quote: I started a recurring deposit alongside my loan repayments. In three years, I had enough saved to pay for my daughter's college admission without taking another loan.
